prestazioni: Engine: EZ36D 3.6L H6 (256 hp stock) – Forced induction via Rotrex C38-91 supercharger (10 psi max boost) with custom intercooler piping (3.5" aluminum mandrel-bent) and AEM 340lph fuel pump to support 400+ whp on E85.

Drivetrain: STI 6-speed manual swap (from GR STI) with ACT HDSS clutch (6-puck cerametallic) and Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (250 Nm torque capacity) for improved power transfer to all four wheels.

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for Outback chassis) with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) and poly bushings (subframe, control arms) to eliminate body roll during aggressive cornering.
estetica: Widebody conversion: Rocket Bunny V2 Outback kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and red pinstriping for OEM+ stealth.
Lighting: LUX H8 V4 LED headlight retrofit (with DRL delete) and Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights (amber delete) for aggressive front-end aesthetics.
Wheels: Enkei PF07 (18x9.5 +35 offset) in Hyper Black with Nitto NT05R tires (255/40/18) and DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors (painted gold) for a JDM-inspired stance.
